text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is finally here! I'd like us to get in
some solid training as fall approaches!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the students' determination is palpable, the
atmosphere on the bus is another matter...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I go boing, boing, boing when I'm happy and shaaah when I'm startled.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: What?! But I totally go boing when I'm happy and shaaah when I'm startled!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it, I guess I do too... technically.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I would also fit that criteria.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mufufu, all good points! Which means...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I see. Is the answer a tail?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ding, ding, ding! One point for Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The bus is just as lively as ever.
